context.projectOverview: Phase 5 — make self-improvement safe. Sprint 3 adds THREE pure, off-by-default guards on the generator↔evaluator loop, each gated by a Sprint 1 selfImprove flag. THE LOAD-BEARING REQUIREMENT: with all flags off (or the section absent), behavior is BYTE-IDENTICAL to today (invariant test sc-3-7). This sprint touches the LIVE files evaluator-agent.ts and pipeline.ts — every new branch must be guarded by config.selfImprove?.<flag> (optional chaining) and the off path must run the existing code unchanged.

completedSprints.title: Replay store + selfImprove config
completedSprints.summary: ffd6e8a — off-by-default selfImprove config section (deterministicGate/rubricIsolation/requireCitedArtifact/replayDir, all default false).

completedSprints.title: Replay run gate
completedSprints.summary: 5b804d1 — replay-harness.ts + `replay run`. Sprint 3 does NOT touch the replay modules.

relevantFiles: src/orchestrator/evaluator-agent.ts (deterministic-gate short-circuit after runEvaluation ~:81, before runAgentEvaluation; cite-artifact wrap on agentResult)
src/orchestrator/pipeline.ts (rubric isolation on the GENERATOR-bound injectedHandoff — NOT the evalHandoff)
src/evaluators/registry.ts + src/config/schema.ts (evaluator.strategies .type/.required ~:56 → build requiredEvaluators set; map by result.evaluator===strategy.type)
src/orchestrator/memory/distill.ts (pure-fn discipline — no clock/fs/mutation — model eval-guards.ts on it)
src/orchestrator/evaluator-agent.test.ts (existing loopSpy harness — reuse for the sc-3-7 byte-identical off-path proof)
